trials.title: Novel Immunotherapy for Advanced Melanoma
trials.description: A Phase II clinical trial evaluating a new immunotherapy combination for patients with advanced melanoma who have not responded to standard treatments. This study aims to assess the efficacy and safety of combining two promising immunotherapy agents.
trials.qualification: Adults 18+ with advanced melanoma, ECOG performance status 0-1, adequate organ function, no prior immunotherapy
eligibilityCriteria: Adequate bone marrow, liver, and kidney function
trials.primaryObjective: Assess overall response rate to combination immunotherapy

trials.title: Heart Failure Prevention in High-Risk Diabetics
trials.description: A large-scale observational study tracking cardiovascular outcomes in diabetic patients at high risk for heart failure. Participants will be monitored for 5 years to identify early intervention strategies.
trials.qualification: Type 2 diabetes for 5+ years, age 45-75, elevated cardiovascular risk markers, stable medication regimen
eligibilityCriteria: Type 2 diabetes for at least 5 years
Elevated HbA1c or cardiovascular risk markers
Ability to attend regular follow-up visits
trials.primaryObjective: Identify predictors of heart failure development in diabetic patients

trials.title: Innovative Stroke Recovery Therapy
trials.description: Testing a novel combination of neurorehabilitation techniques including virtual reality therapy and targeted brain stimulation to improve recovery outcomes in stroke patients.
trials.qualification: Stroke within past 6 months, age 18-80, moderate to severe functional deficits, medically stable

location.address: 1500 San Pablo St, Los Angeles, CA 90033

eligibilityCriteria: Ischemic or hemorrhagic stroke within 6 months
Medically stable with no acute complications
Able to participate in rehabilitation activities
trials.primaryObjective: Evaluate efficacy of combined VR and brain stimulation therapy
trials.sponsor: USC Stevens Neuroimaging and Informatics Institute

trials.title: Digital Mental Health Platform for Depression
trials.description: Comparing the effectiveness of a new AI-powered digital therapy platform versus traditional therapy for treating moderate to severe depression in adults.
trials.qualification: Adults 21-65 with major depression, PHQ-9 score 10+, smartphone access, English fluency
trials.primaryObjective: Compare depression scores between digital and traditional therapy

trials.title: Precision Medicine for Breast Cancer Treatment
trials.description: Using genetic testing to personalize chemotherapy selection for early-stage breast cancer patients, aiming to improve outcomes while reducing unnecessary side effects.
trials.qualification: Early-stage breast cancer, HER2-negative, candidates for chemotherapy, willing for genetic testing
eligibilityCriteria: Willing to undergo tumor genetic testing
trials.primaryObjective: Improve treatment selection through genetic profiling

trials.title: Robotic Surgery Recovery Enhancement
trials.description: Evaluating enhanced recovery protocols following robotic colorectal surgery to reduce hospital stays and improve patient outcomes through optimized pain management and early mobilization.
trials.qualification: Scheduled for robotic colorectal surgery, age 18-85, ASA score I-III, ability to follow protocol
eligibilityCriteria: Scheduled for elective robotic colorectal surgery
Ability to understand and follow study protocol
trials.primaryObjective: Reduce length of hospital stay with enhanced recovery protocol

trials.title: Alzheimer's Disease Prevention Trial
trials.description: Testing a multi-modal intervention including cognitive training, physical exercise, and nutritional supplements to prevent cognitive decline in individuals at high risk for Alzheimer's disease.
trials.qualification: Age 65-80, family history of dementia, mild cognitive concerns, physically able to exercise

location.address: 200 W Arbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92103

eligibilityCriteria: Family history of dementia or Alzheimer's
Mild cognitive concerns but not dementia
Physically able to participate in exercise program
trials.primaryObjective: Prevent or delay cognitive decline through multi-modal intervention
trials.sponsor: UC San Diego Alzheimer's Disease Cooperative Study

trials.title: Advanced Prostate Cancer Imaging Study
trials.description: Comparing advanced MRI techniques with traditional imaging for detecting and staging prostate cancer, potentially reducing the need for invasive biopsies.
trials.qualification: Suspected prostate cancer, elevated PSA, age 45-80, scheduled for biopsy, no prior prostate treatment
eligibilityCriteria: Suspected prostate cancer based on clinical findings
trials.primaryObjective: Compare accuracy of advanced MRI versus standard imaging

trials.title: CAR-T Cell Therapy for Lymphoma
trials.description: Advanced cellular immunotherapy trial using genetically modified T-cells to treat patients with relapsed or refractory B-cell lymphomas that have not responded to standard treatments.
trials.qualification: Relapsed/refractory B-cell lymphoma, age 18+, adequate organ function, failed 2+ prior therapies
eligibilityCriteria: Failed at least 2 prior treatment regimens
trials.primaryObjective: Evaluate safety and efficacy of CAR-T cell therapy
trials.sponsor: City of Hope Comprehensive Cancer Center

trials.title: Pediatric Asthma Digital Monitoring
trials.description: Using wearable devices and smartphone apps to monitor asthma symptoms and medication adherence in children, aiming to prevent severe asthma attacks through early intervention.
trials.qualification: Children 8-17 with persistent asthma, smartphone access, parental consent, stable on controller medication
trials.primaryObjective: Reduce asthma exacerbations through digital monitoring

trials.title: COVID-19 Long-Term Effects Study
trials.description: Comprehensive longitudinal study tracking the long-term effects of COVID-19 infection, including neurological, cardiovascular, and pulmonary complications in recovered patients.
trials.qualification: Prior COVID-19 infection confirmed by testing, age 18+, symptoms lasting 3+ months post-infection
trials.primaryObjective: Characterize long-term effects of COVID-19 infection
secondaryObjectives: Identify risk factors for long COVID
trials.sponsor: UCLA David Geffen School of Medicine

trials.title: Minimally Invasive Heart Valve Repair
trials.description: Evaluating a new transcatheter approach for mitral valve repair that reduces recovery time and improves outcomes compared to traditional open-heart surgery.
trials.qualification: Severe mitral regurgitation, high surgical risk, age 65+, heart team approval for procedure
eligibilityCriteria: Heart team recommendation for transcatheter therapy
trials.primaryObjective: Evaluate safety and efficacy of transcatheter mitral valve repair

trials.title: Personalized Cancer Vaccine Development
trials.description: Creating individualized vaccines based on each patient's unique tumor genetics to stimulate immune responses against their specific cancer type.
trials.qualification: Solid tumor malignancy, adequate tissue for analysis, completed standard treatment, stable disease

location.address: 1500 San Pablo St, Los Angeles, CA 90033

eligibilityCriteria: Solid tumor malignancy with adequate tissue
trials.primaryObjective: Assess immune response to personalized cancer vaccines

trials.title: Diabetes Prevention Through Lifestyle Coaching
trials.description: Large-scale intervention study using digital health coaching and remote monitoring to prevent type 2 diabetes in high-risk individuals through sustained lifestyle changes.
trials.qualification: Pre-diabetes diagnosis, BMI 25+, age 35-70, smartphone access, motivation for lifestyle change
trials.primaryObjective: Prevent progression to type 2 diabetes

trials.title: Novel Arthritis Pain Management
trials.description: Testing a new non-opioid pain management approach combining targeted physical therapy, mindfulness techniques, and innovative topical treatments for rheumatoid arthritis.
trials.qualification: Rheumatoid arthritis diagnosis, moderate to severe pain, age 21-75, stable on DMARDs, willing to reduce pain medications
eligibilityCriteria: Moderate to severe joint pain (VAS score 4+)
Willing to participate in mindfulness training
trials.primaryObjective: Reduce pain scores through multimodal non-opioid approach

trials.title: Emergency Department AI Diagnostic Tool
trials.description: Implementing and evaluating an artificial intelligence system to assist emergency physicians in diagnosing acute conditions, aiming to improve accuracy and reduce diagnostic delays.
trials.qualification: Emergency department patients presenting with chest pain, abdominal pain, or shortness of breath
eligibilityCriteria: Chief complaint of chest pain, abdominal pain, or dyspnea
trials.primaryObjective: Improve diagnostic accuracy with AI assistance
secondaryObjectives: Assess physician acceptance of AI recommendations
trials.sponsor: Sharp Memorial Hospital Emergency Medicine Research

trials.title: Gene Therapy for Inherited Blindness
trials.description: Groundbreaking gene therapy trial for patients with Leber congenital amaurosis, using AAV vectors to deliver functional copies of genes to restore vision.
trials.qualification: Leber congenital amaurosis diagnosis, specific gene mutation, age 3+, some remaining retinal function

location.address: 200 W Arbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92103

eligibilityCriteria: Confirmed diagnosis of Leber congenital amaurosis
trials.primaryObjective: Restore or improve vision through gene replacement
secondaryObjectives: Assess long-term safety of gene therapy
trials.sponsor: UC San Diego Shiley Eye Institute

trials.title: Precision Oncology Biomarker Discovery
trials.description: Large-scale genomic analysis study to identify new biomarkers that predict response to targeted cancer therapies, potentially revolutionizing personalized cancer treatment.
trials.qualification: Any solid tumor malignancy, planned for targeted therapy, adequate tissue available, willing for genomic testing
eligibilityCriteria: Adequate tumor tissue for genomic analysis
Willing to undergo comprehensive genomic testing
trials.primaryObjective: Identify predictive biomarkers for targeted therapy response

trials.title: Advanced Pancreatic Cancer Treatment
trials.description: Combination trial testing a novel drug combination with immunotherapy for patients with advanced pancreatic cancer, one of the most challenging cancers to treat.
trials.qualification: Metastatic pancreatic adenocarcinoma, ECOG 0-1, adequate organ function, no more than 1 prior therapy
eligibilityCriteria: Adequate liver, kidney, and bone marrow function
No more than 1 prior systemic therapy
trials.primaryObjective: Evaluate efficacy of novel combination therapy
trials.sponsor: City of Hope Comprehensive Cancer Center

trials.title: Pediatric Rare Disease Gene Therapy
trials.description: Innovative gene therapy for children with spinal muscular atrophy, using advanced viral vectors to deliver therapeutic genes directly to motor neurons.
trials.qualification: Spinal muscular atrophy diagnosis, age 2-18, specific genetic confirmation, adequate respiratory function
trials.primaryObjective: Improve motor function through gene replacement

trials.title: Brain-Computer Interface for Paralysis
trials.description: Revolutionary study testing brain-computer interface technology to restore communication and control abilities in patients with severe paralysis from spinal cord injury or ALS.
trials.qualification: Severe paralysis from spinal cord injury or ALS, age 18-65, stable medical condition, strong motivation
eligibilityCriteria: Severe paralysis from spinal cord injury or ALS
trials.primaryObjective: Restore communication abilities through brain-computer interface

trials.title: Advanced Kidney Disease Treatment
trials.description: Testing a novel therapeutic approach to slow progression of chronic kidney disease and potentially avoid the need for dialysis in patients with advanced kidney disease.
trials.qualification: Chronic kidney disease stage 3-4, proteinuria, age 21-80, stable on ACE inhibitors/ARBs, eGFR 15-60
eligibilityCriteria: Stable on ACE inhibitors or ARBs
trials.primaryObjective: Slow progression of chronic kidney disease

trials.title: Virtual Reality Therapy for PTSD
trials.description: Innovative treatment combining virtual reality exposure therapy with biofeedback to treat post-traumatic stress disorder in veterans and civilian trauma survivors.
trials.qualification: PTSD diagnosis, age 18-65, trauma history, no active substance abuse, able to use VR equipment

location.address: 1500 San Pablo St, Los Angeles, CA 90033

eligibilityCriteria: PTSD diagnosis confirmed by clinical assessment
Physically able to use VR equipment
trials.primaryObjective: Reduce PTSD symptoms through VR exposure therapy

trials.title: Artificial Pancreas for Type 1 Diabetes
trials.description: Testing an advanced automated insulin delivery system (artificial pancreas) that continuously monitors blood glucose and automatically adjusts insulin delivery in real-time.
trials.qualification: Type 1 diabetes for 2+ years, age 14-65, C-peptide negative, on insulin pump therapy, HbA1c 6-10%
eligibilityCriteria: Type 1 diabetes for at least 2 years
trials.primaryObjective: Improve glucose control with automated insulin delivery

trials.title: Liquid Biopsy for Early Cancer Detection
trials.description: Developing a blood test that can detect multiple types of cancer in their earliest stages by analyzing circulating tumor DNA and other biomarkers in blood samples.
trials.qualification: High cancer risk (family history, genetic predisposition), age 50+, no current cancer diagnosis, willing for blood draws
eligibilityCriteria: High cancer risk based on family history or genetics
Willing to undergo regular blood sampling
trials.primaryObjective: Develop accurate blood-based cancer screening test

trials.title: Robotic Spine Surgery Outcomes
trials.description: Comparing outcomes of robotic-assisted spine surgery versus traditional techniques for complex spinal conditions, focusing on precision, recovery time, and long-term results.
trials.qualification: Complex spinal condition requiring surgery, age 18-75, candidate for robotic approach, no prior spinal surgery at target level
eligibilityCriteria: Complex spinal condition requiring surgical intervention
No prior surgery at target spinal level
trials.primaryObjective: Compare surgical precision between robotic and traditional techniques
secondaryObjectives: Assess recovery time and pain scores

trials.title: Regenerative Medicine for Heart Failure
trials.description: Groundbreaking trial using stem cell therapy to regenerate damaged heart muscle in patients with heart failure, potentially reversing heart damage thought to be permanent.
trials.qualification: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction, optimal medical therapy, age 21-75, ejection fraction <40%

location.address: 200 W Arbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92103

eligibilityCriteria: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
On optimal medical therapy for 3+ months
trials.primaryObjective: Improve cardiac function through stem cell regeneration
secondaryObjectives: Assess safety of stem cell therapy

trials.title: Precision Radiotherapy for Lung Cancer
trials.description: Advanced radiation therapy technique using real-time imaging and adaptive planning to precisely target lung tumors while minimizing damage to healthy tissue.
trials.qualification: Early-stage lung cancer, medically inoperable or declining surgery, age 18+, adequate pulmonary function
trials.primaryObjective: Achieve local tumor control with adaptive radiotherapy

trials.title: Microbiome Therapy for Cancer Treatment
trials.description: Investigating how modifying the gut microbiome can enhance the effectiveness of cancer immunotherapy and reduce treatment-related side effects.
trials.qualification: Solid tumor malignancy, starting immunotherapy, willing for stool sampling, no recent antibiotics
trials.primaryObjective: Enhance immunotherapy response through microbiome modulation
trials.sponsor: City of Hope Comprehensive Cancer Center

trials.title: Pediatric Mental Health Digital Intervention
trials.description: Comprehensive digital mental health platform specifically designed for children and adolescents, combining therapy apps, family involvement, and AI-powered mood monitoring.
trials.qualification: Children/adolescents 8-17 with anxiety or depression, parental consent, access to smartphone/tablet, English fluency
eligibilityCriteria: Access to smartphone or tablet device
trials.primaryObjective: Improve mental health outcomes through digital intervention
secondaryObjectives: Reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression
